title: Pricing and Hedging Strategies for Cross-Currency Equity Protection Swaps
summary: This is an academic research paper (32 pages) by Marek Rutkowski and Huansang Xu examining pricing and hedging frameworks for cross-currency equity protection swaps (EPS), using Monte Carlo simulations and approximation methods. The paper was originally submitted September 28, 2024 and revised April 9, 2026. It is purely theoretical/quantitative finance research focused on derivative pricing models.
key_points: Authors: Marek Rutkowski and Huansang Xu; academic paper in mathematical finance (arXiv:2409.19387)
Subject: Pricing and hedging of equity protection swaps (EPS) with cross-currency reference portfolios
Two hedging paradigms examined: separate treatment of domestic/foreign equities vs. integrated total returns across currencies
Uses Monte Carlo simulations, geometric averaging, and moment matching for basket option pricing
Aggregated hedging portfolios contain basket options that only exist in the OTC market
Submitted to arXiv September 28, 2024; last revised April 9, 2026 (v2)
why_it_matters: This source does not address market structure or macro catalysts and should be excluded from the archive per CORE RULE 1. It is theoretical academic research with no relevance to market microstructure, trading operations, monetary policy, or economic data releases.
